name: Okta - Alert on User Account Lockouts
xql_query:
datamodel dataset = okta_sso_raw
| filter xdm.event.operation contains "lock"
| fields *
description: Identifies events where a user's Okta account has been locked. This is a critical event for a SOC to investigate, as it often indicates a brute-force or password spraying attack in progress.
alert_name: Okta - Alert on User Account Lockouts
